name: Litter Box Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Butter or margarine (1 and 1/3 sticks)
2/3 cup Butter or margarine (1 and 1/3 sticks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave the honey until it bubbles (about 1 minute).
2. Add the melted butter, and the molasses if using.
3. Add the egg, mixing well.
4. Gradually add all other ingredients: flour, cocoa powder, spices, and Grapenuts cereal.
5. Mix in any desired mix-ins such as coconut, chocolate chips, butterscotch chips, or peanut butter chips.
6. Chill the dough for 1 hour in the freezer or several hours in the fridge.
7. Roll the chilled dough into logs of various lengths and diameters resembling cat poop.
8. Roll each log in Grapenuts cereal before baking at 350°F (175°C) until cooked through, about 10 to 15 minutes.
9. Serve the cookies in a disposable cat litter box atop a layer of Grapenuts cereal, using a cat litter scoop for serving.
